title: Ultra flash cold events under global warming
description: This study finds that ultra flash cold events, marked by sudden extreme temperature drops, are intensifying over North America but fading over Eurasia. Current climate models miss this divergence, posing several socioeconomical risks.
content: It is widely assumed that global warming will make winters milder and reduce extreme cold. However, this assumption is contradicted by the recurrence of flash cold (FC) eventssudden, violent temperat… [+1117 chars]
de: Ultraschnelle Kälteereignisse im Zuge der globalen Erwärmung. Diese Studie kommt zu dem Ergebnis, dass sich extreme Kälteereignisse, die durch plötzliche extreme Temperaturabfälle gekennzeichnet sind, über Nordamerika verstärken, über Eurasien jedoch nachlassen. Aktuelle Klimamodelle übersehen diese Divergenz, was mehrere sozioökonomische Risiken mit sich bringt.
en: Ultra flash cold events under global warming. This study finds that ultra flash cold events, marked by sudden extreme temperature drops, are intensifying over North America but fading over Eurasia. Current climate models miss this divergence, posing several socioeconomical risks.

Exemplaria climatis currentis hanc discrepantiam desiderant, varia pericula oeconomicae ponentes.
